findings.title: Proof receipt source package does not match final bundle
findings.rationale: The final review evidence snapshot and review bundle are bound to source package 0f11069d-ea5e-4084-b055-ddd887c734e3, but the cited proof receipt still says its source package is cb52fafa-516f-4028-ab1a-eec0e83a9fcc. The authority repair behavior and tests appear covered elsewhere, so this is traceability hygiene rather than a blocker, but the receipt should not point reviewers at an older package when proving the final repair.
findings.suggested_next_action: Update the proof receipt source package line to 0f11069d-ea5e-4084-b055-ddd887c734e3 or add a brief note explaining why the older package id remains relevant to the final bundle.
